XKOVA Public SDK (workspace)
============================
Location: repository root

This folder is a standalone pnpm workspace containing the public XKOVA SDK packages:
- @xkova/sdk
- @xkova/sdk-core
- @xkova/sdk-react
- @xkova/sdk-react-ui
- @xkova/sdk-browser
- @xkova/sdk-agent

Start Here (package READMEs)
----------------------------
- README.md
- packages/sdk/README.md
- packages/sdk-core/README.md
- packages/sdk-react/README.md
- packages/sdk-react-ui/README.md
- packages/sdk-browser/README.md
- packages/sdk-agent/README.md

Package Summary
---------------
@xkova/sdk
- Umbrella SDK package; exposes core/headless, React, UI, Node, browser, telemetry, and ABI entry points.

@xkova/sdk-core
- Headless (non-React) SDK for OAuth and apps/api; typed services and helpers for server or headless browser integrations.

@xkova/sdk-react
- React provider, hooks, and agent helpers for browser-based React apps.

@xkova/sdk-react-ui
- Optional UI components for apps using @xkova/sdk-react; Tailwind/shadcn-compatible.

@xkova/sdk-browser
- Vanilla browser helpers for launching the XKOVA IEE (SafeApprove) iframe and receiving a receipt via strict postMessage validation.

Entry Points & Exports (from package.json)
------------------------------------------
@xkova/sdk
- @xkova/sdk
- @xkova/sdk/core
- @xkova/sdk/node
- @xkova/sdk/react
- @xkova/sdk/ui
- @xkova/sdk/ui/styles.css
- @xkova/sdk/browser
- @xkova/sdk/telemetry
- @xkova/sdk/telemetry-adapters
- @xkova/sdk/abis

@xkova/sdk-core
- @xkova/sdk-core
- @xkova/sdk-core/core
- @xkova/sdk-core/telemetry
- @xkova/sdk-core/telemetry-adapters
- @xkova/sdk-core/abis
- @xkova/sdk-core/node

@xkova/sdk-react
- @xkova/sdk-react

@xkova/sdk-react-ui
- @xkova/sdk-react-ui
- @xkova/sdk-react-ui/utils
- @xkova/sdk-react-ui/styles.css

@xkova/sdk-browser
- @xkova/sdk-browser

Requirements (from READMEs / package metadata)
----------------------------------------------
- Node >= 20 for all SDK packages (engines in each package.json).
- ESM-only: @xkova/sdk, @xkova/sdk-core, @xkova/sdk-react, @xkova/sdk-react-ui.
- React 16.8+ required for @xkova/sdk-react and @xkova/sdk-react-ui.
- @xkova/sdk-browser is browser-only (DOM required; not compatible with SSR/Node.js).

Key Concepts (from READMEs)
---------------------------
Hosts (sdk-core):
- OAuth base URL and apps/api host are distinct. Headless helpers require explicit hosts.
- resolveApiBaseUrl builds a safe apps/api base URL from an apiHost.

IEE (SafeApprove) receipts:
- Receipt-gated write operations require an IEE (SafeApprove) receipt.
- @xkova/sdk-browser provides launchIee and createBrowserIeeReceiptProvider for browser flows.
- @xkova/sdk-react handles IEE when XKOVAProvider is configured with a receipt provider.

------------------------------------------

- index.ts

- node.ts
- react.ts
- ui.ts

Workspace Commands (from README.md)
--------------------------------------------------------
- pnpm install
- pnpm -r build
